verses.1: Judge me, LORD, for I have walked in my integrity.
verses.2: Examine me, LORD, and prove me.
verses.3: For your loving kindness is before my eyes.
verses.4: I have not sat with deceitful men,
verses.5: I hate the assembly of evildoers,
verses.6: I will wash my hands in innocence,
verses.7: that I may make the voice of thanksgiving to be heard
verses.8: LORD, I love the habitation of your house,
verses.9: Don’t gather my soul with sinners,
verses.11: But as for me, I will walk in my integrity.
verses.12: My foot stands in an even place.
